title: Industrial GRP Panel Tank
description: High-capacity modular GRP panel tank. Ideal for multi-story buildings or industrial water storage. Fully refurbished with new internal coating and professional reinforcement.

title: Horizontal Diesel Storage Tank
description: Heavy-duty steel diesel storage tank. Double-walled for safety and leak prevention. Includes pump mounting points. Fully pressure tested for industrial fuel storage.

title: Premium PVC Vertical Tank
description: Multi-layered UV-stabilized PVC tank. Designed to withstand extreme UAE desert heat. Algae-resistant inner lining and heavy-duty threaded lid.

title: Compact GRP Panel Tank
description: Space-saving GRP panel tank for residential villas or small commercial units. Easy to dismantle and relocate. Heat resistant and highly durable.

title: Vertical Diesel Fuel Tank
description: Vertical fuel storage solution for generators or small machinery. Rust-treated and painted with high-visibility safety markings.

title: Industrial SS 316 Tank
description: Marine-grade SS 316 tank for chemicals or high-purity water. Corrosion-resistant and polished. Ideal for beverage or pharmaceutical use.

title: Horizontal Poly Water Tank
description: Low-profile horizontal poly tank. Perfect for installation where height is restricted or for mobile water transport needs.

title: Jumbo GRP Modular System
description: Extra-large modular water storage unit. Professionally refurbished with food-grade epoxy coating. Includes external ladders and heavy-duty ventilation.

title: Refurbished Plastic Tank
description: Standard 1000L plastic tank. Cleaned, repaired where needed, and leak-tested.

title: Refurbished GI Water Tank
description: Durable GI tank for construction sites or basic water storage. Refurbished, coated, and tested.

title: Premium Fiber (FRP) Water Tank
description: High-strength fiberglass tank, ideal for underground or rooftop installation. Corrosion-resistant and heat-insulated for UAE conditions.

title: Triple-Layer Plastic Tank
description: Premium triple-layer plastic tank with extra UV protection and anti-bacterial inner lining. Keeps water cooler during summer.

title: Fiberglass Modular Sectional Tank
description: Modular fiber tank section. Easy to assemble in restricted spaces. Perfect for building maintenance or expansion.

title: Compact Plastic Water Tank
description: Space-saving compact plastic tank for small villas or garden irrigation. Lightweight and easy to move.
